title: gladiolus erectiflorus
intro: Gladiolus erectiflorus, also known as the Erect Flowering Gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gladiolus erectiflorus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus erectiflorus often involve infusions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to apply its medicinal properties.
